name: Tortilla Dressing
recipeIngredient: 8 Flour tortillas, cut into thirds and then across into 1/4 inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-size skillet, add 1/4 inch of oil and heat over medium-high until hot.
2. Add corn tortilla strips, a few at a time, and fry until crisp, about 45 seconds. Remove with a slotted spoon and place on a double layer of paper towels to drain.
3. Combine the fried corn tortilla strips with the remaining ingredients except salt in a large bowl. Refrigerate for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
4. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees.
5. Season the dressing with salt.
6. Grease a casserole dish and add the dressing. Cover and bake for 45 minutes. Serve warm.
